debug_info.goal:
U : Type
A : Set U
X1 X2 : Set ↑A
h : HTPI.Exercises.val_image U A X1 = HTPI.Exercises.val_image U A X2
⊢ X1 ⊆ X2

proof:
by
  intro x hx
  have hx' : x.val ∈ val_image A X1 := by
    refine ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
  have : x.val ∈ val_image A X2 := by
    simpa [h] using hx'
  rcases this with ⟨y, hy, hval⟩
  have : y = x := by
    apply Subtype.ext
    simpa [hval]
  simpa [this] using hy
